items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – Paid Acting Opportunity | Cambridge, MA

 

Hi all! I am casting **3 actors** for a series of short nurse training videos filming on **Friday, May 29th** in Cambridge, MA. All 3 actors are needed for the full day (9:00 AM – 4:00 PM).

 

This is a non-union, paid opportunity. Compensation will be shared upon inquiry. Lunch, snacks, and refreshments will be provided. Transportation costs will not be covered. Prior acting experience is preferred, as there will be no teleprompter on-set and you **must have the ability to memorize lines**.

──────────────────────────

🎭 ROLES WE'RE CASTING - *Ethnicity is open for all roles, age ranges are firm*

──────────────────────────

👩 ACTOR A — Woman, Ages 40–60

Appears in 2 of 3 videos. Will play a nurse (scrubs provided) and a central character in a workplace conflict scenario. Must be comfortable portraying emotional range — including frustration, composure, and resolution. Must bring a business casual outfit for filming.

 

👩 ACTOR B — Woman, Ages 20–30

Appears in all 3 videos. Will play a nurse in two scenarios (scrubs provided) and a business casual office worker in a third. Must bring a business casual outfit for filming.

 

👨 ACTOR C — Man, Ages 25–55

Appears in 2 of 3 videos. Will play a nurse (scrubs provided) and a business casual office worker. Must bring a business casual outfit for filming.

 

──────────────────────────

📋 VIDEO OVERVIEW - *Scripts will be provided in advance so actors can prepare*

──────────────────────────

 

Video 1 (~5 min) — All 3 actors

A workplace conflict between two nurses, followed by a debrief with a colleague, and a resolution. Set in a breakroom/hallway setting. Medical scrubs will be provided to wear.

 

Video 2 (~5 min) — Actors A & B

A nurse delivers difficult news to a patient. Intimate, low-key setting. Requires emotional sensitivity and natural delivery. Medical scrubs will be provided to wear for nurse.

 

Video 3 (~5 min) — Actors B & C

Two coworkers navigate a workplace conflict — filmed three different ways with identical blocking. Business casual attire required to be provided by the actor.

 

──────────────────────────

📩 TO SUBMIT

──────────────────────────

Please email me at carladibiase6@gmail.com with:

 

• Your name

• Age

• Which role you're submitting for

• A recent photo and a reel(s) of acting you have done in the past

• A resume of past experience

 

I will be in touch with those who reach out – thank you!!

items.text:
🚨 EMERGENCY CASTING CALL — ATLANTA 🚨
S.W.A.T.S. — Coming-of-age short film set in Southwest Atlanta. Festival circuit. Two-day shoot: Saturday May 2nd & Sunday May 3rd. Non-union. Copy, credit, meals on set.
We are looking for 4 roles and we need to move FAST.  TERRANCE — Black male, 17-22. Big. Physical. Intimidating presence. The kind of guy who makes a hallway feel smaller when he walks in. But there’s a scene where he sits alone at a kitchen table while his mother walks away and doesn’t look back — and we need THAT guy too. If you can do both, we want to see you.
TERRANCE’S MOTHER — Black female, late 30s. Tired in a way that sleep doesn’t fix. One scene, minimal dialogue, but it carries the whole film on its back. Strong physical actors only — this performance lives in stillness and body language.
MALIKE’S MOTHER — Black female, mid-to-late 30s. Passed out on the couch in her work uniform when her son leaves for school. She loves him. She’s just got nothing left. Mostly non-speaking but your presence is everything.
MS. JOHNSON — Female, 35-55, any ethnicity. The teacher who has seen every trick in the book. Comic authority. Timing matters. Two scenes — the kind of role that gets remembered.

📩 To submit send to koachcarterfilms@gmail.com or DM @koachcarter26
Include: recent photo, name, age, which role, availability for May 2-3, and any reel or experience.
Shoot dates are locked. No flexibility. If you’re serious, move fast.
ATL, let’s go

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 –Waffen SS ( szeregowy )**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzn** **bez zarostu** w **wieku 20 – 40** lat o wzroście 170 - 180  cm, pas 90/110 i **obwód klatki  90/110cm**  i do roli żołnierzy szeregowego Waffen SS .Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest  na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach jak na zdjęciach. W projekcie **planujemy 6 odcinków** w tym połowa z nich jest z żołnierzami.

Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**013 Mini serial 1940 historyczny z elementami fantazy**

** **

**Poszukujemy szefa organizacji   Ahnenerbe Starszego Pułkownika SS**

** **

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **szuka mężczyzny do roli głównego szefa organizacji Ahnenerbe która poszukuje skarbu templariuszy i artefaktu o Boskich mocach. Najlepiej jakby kandydat miał **od 40 – 60 lat o wzroście 170 i szczupłej sylwetce bez zarostu na twarzy** **z surowym spojrzeniem.** Wszystkie kwestie będą mówione po niemiecku dla lepszego efektu filmu. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej (osoby dalsza nie będą brane pod uwagę). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. **Prosimy o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć** gdyż tylko takowe zgłoszenia będą rozpatrywane. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie, jest to ważny czynnik w wyborze kandydata jak również doświadczenie aktorskie ( nie koniecznie duże ). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic.  Postać szefa Ahnenerbe pojawi się w kilku odcinkach. Plan zdjęciowy mamy 09.05.26 ( Sobota ) godz. 17.00 – 22.00

 

**PETER KOCH - **niemiecki nazista, szef grupy ekspedycyjnej Ahnenerbe. Z wyglądu typowy niemiec o blond włosach. Zawsze chodzi elegancko ubrany. Jego prawą ręką jest Elke Meier kobieta zimna i wyrachowana. Peter nigdy nie rozstaje się ze swoją walizką, w której ma szereg ważnych dokumentów i danych z jego wypraw ekspedycyjnych. Nie ufa nikomu dlatego wszystko co bardzo ważne przechowuje właśnie w tej walizce. Sam osobiście udaje się do Himmlera aby poinformować o ostatnim tropie pewnego ważnego artefaktu, który może dać władze nazistom nad światem.

** **

** **

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

 

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
PILNE OGŁOSZENIE – NAGRANIA WROCŁAW 🎬
Szukamy kobiety i mężczyzny w wieku 25–35 lat do udziału w nagraniach dla marki meblowej UNO48.

📍 Miejsce: studio nagraniowe, Wrocław

📅 Termin: 6 maja (środa)

⏰ Czas pracy: cały dzień, start od godz. 8:00

Na czym polega projekt?

Realizujemy profesjonalne nagrania z doświadczoną ekipą filmową:

– kilka rolek do social mediów

– 1 spot promocyjny (reklama wizerunkowa)

Nagrania bez tekstów mówionych – liczy się naturalność, swoboda przed kamerą i estetyka ruchu.

Kogo szukamy?

– kobiety i mężczyzny 25–35 lat

– osoby swobodnie czującej się przed kamerą

– mile widziane doświadczenie w nagraniach / sesjach, ale nie jest to warunek konieczny

Współpraca:

Warunki (wynagrodzenie / forma) do indywidualnego ustalenia.

⚠️ Ogłoszenie pilne – osoba, która miała brać udział w nagraniach z przyczyn prywatnych musiała zrezygnować, dlatego działamy szybko.

📩 Zgłoszenia (zdjęcia + krótkie info o sobie) prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej lub mailowo: biuro@kosaprojects.pl

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text: I would really like to get into acting. I keep thinking about it a lot 😩I see roles, castings and genuinely think I would smash that 🤣 just because now am 42 and haven’t done it since I was a child am like 🤯 scared maybe 🙈 and the thought of getting headshots is so daunting. Any words of wisdom 🙈❤️

topComments.text:
- Training
- Headshots
- Agent
- Spotlight profile

Follow Casting Directors on Instagram for Open Castings
Open castings also shared on Casting Calls UK and Film & TV Casting Calls UK

Book a headshot session ASAP. That will commit you to taking action. Setup a BackStage/StarNow/Mandy profile, stick a monologue or two on there and apply to every role that suits you.

While you’re going to acting classes, you can also use any audition requests from your BackStage profile as a way to either pick up some work (most likely student films at first), or at least learn on the job. Always ask for feedback - which you might get about 5% of the time, but it’s worth asking.

And build up your social media network - oftentimes casting calls are just posted on Insta or Facebook, so it’s good to keep up to date that way.

items.text:
Hello everyone 🙂

CASTING CALL BLACK, ASIAN OR MIXED ACTRESS (VOICE OVER ROLE FOR VIDEO GAME)

I am currently casting for a narrative-driven VR project at Escape Studios titled Heavy is the Crown, and I am looking for a voice actress to portray the lead role of Lenore Vespen.

Lenore is a complex, emotionally layered character, and the performance is voice-over led, with a strong focus on internal monologue, subtlety, and psychological depth.

For this role, we are specifically seeking a Black, Asian or mixed-race actress, as the character is of African and Asian heritage.

I would love to invite any actress interested to submit a self-tape for the role. Please find attached the casting brief, which includes full details of the project and a monologue for audition.

This is a student industry project with a £100 honorarium, offering a strong, narrative-focused piece for showreel, as well as collaboration within a semi-professional production environment.

Self-tape deadline is set on April 30th and the recording session will take place on the week starting May 4th, the day will be set at the actress's convenience.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions—I’d be very happy to provide further information.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Don’t hesitate to share to any actress you think might fit the role I would really appreciate it,

Thanks,

Mary-Jane
Director

Looking for 3 African American actresses for a primarily silent short film slated for June 20 -21. These roles are paid. Based in Los Angeles, CA

**Lead:**

*Mid 20's*

An African-American woman with a darker complexion is battling her mental health, worn down by the pressures of city life, adulthood, and past trauma. She retreats into the woods in an attempt to reconnect with herself and find clarity. Physically fit, she is capable of running and navigating the terrain. Actress must be comfortable being immersed in nature, including scenes involving dirt and mud.

**Young Aurora**

*Age 6-10*

Child actor. African-American. Happy, picture of innocence; the heart of the project wants for her older self's survival and tries to guide her to safety. Comfortable with running and in nature. Darker complexion.

**Older Aurora**

*45-55*

A tortured soul. The antagonist of the story is determined to end her younger self's life/suffering; comfortable in nature and running; comfortable with using a bow and arrow, but prior experience is not required. Also comfortable with brief tasteful nudity.

Please email the director your headshot, reel/work, and Instagram (if available): imanijngrant@gmail.com

[[www.everythingisplural.com](www.everythingisplural.com)](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.everythingisplural.com)

items.text:
👗 **FITTING MODEL WANTED – Size 38** 👗
📍 Berlin-Charlottenburg

You’re a size 38 and curious what really happens behind the scenes of a fashion brand?
Join our fitting sessions and be part of how our collections come to life. 🙌✨

✨ **What you’ll do**
• Try on new styles together with our product team 👚
• Give honest feedback on fit, comfort & feel 💬
• Help us perfect our collections before launch 🎯
→ No shootings, no runway – just real product work 🚫📸

📏 **Your measurements (approx.)**
• Height: 168 cm (±4 cm)
• Bust: 88 cm (±2 cm)
• Waist: 73 cm (±2 cm)
• Hips: 98 cm (±2 cm)

🕒 **The setup**
• 2x per week, approx. 3h per session ⏰
• Monday–Friday (daytime) 📅
• Freelance, mini-job or working student 💼

📩 **How to apply**
Send an email to job@legerbylenagercke.com with:
1️⃣ Photos (front / side / back) in fitted top & leggings 📸
2️⃣ Your current measurements 📐
3️⃣ A few lines about yourself & your availability ✍️

🔗 [https://www.legerbylenagercke.com/pages/karriere](https://www.legerbylenagercke.com/pages/karriere)
items.previewDescription: LeGer by Lena Gercke is a Berlin-based fashion brand that empowers women through fashion and builds an inspiring and supportive community.

Von "Wilde Kerle" hin zu der Eigenproduktion "Späti" in ZDF. Wilson Gonzalez Ochsenknecht versucht gerade den Sprung vom Schauspieler hin zum Producer. Wie gut das gelingt/gelingen kann und wie das Netzwerk dahinter aussieht...seht ihr hier!

items.text:
Projekt studencki!
Poszukujemy aktorów. Będziemy realizować krótką etiudę reklamową (30 sekund) w ramach projektu studenckiego
Do projektu zapraszamy:
– mężczyznę do 30 lat, mile widziane kręcone włosy  
– kobietę brunetkę do 30 lat  

Termin nagrania: 29.04  
Wynagrodzenie: 50 zł

Zainteresowanych prosimy o pozostawienie komentarza pod postem — skontaktujemy się z Wami w wiadomości prywatnej.

topComments.text: Przecież napisane jest, że to projekt studencki. Przeważnie są non profit. Tutaj dziewczyna postanowiła symbolicznie wynagrodzić zaangażowanie chętnych. Ale  "gwiazdy"  dużego i małego ekranu postanowili się popisać  elokwencją. Żenada.
Chyba dwa zera za tą kwotą gdzieś się Państwu zgubiły

Projekt studencki!

items.text:
TITLE & TYPE: Pilot

CASTING: Any gender, ages ranges 18+ and up

LOCATION: Greater Washington DC area (Silver Spring, Fredericksburg, Baltimore, Richmond, etc. 

COMPENSATION: Selected participants will receive a paid stipend, plus the show will pay for the filmed/resulting "judgement"

CONTACT: robin@potenciapics.com

TIME(s): Casting NOW (4/27) until May 18th, 2026 Filming dates TBD 

ANYTHING ELSE: Non-union. We're looking for REAL people in the greater Washington DC area who have gone through civil, family, or small claims court, and are willing to revisit and share their case- we want to hear from you! If you're not in the DC area, please feel free to share with people there. We're casting until May 18th. Paid stipend for individuals selected to participate. Check out the casting notice for details.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'CASTING CALL: SHOW STILL NOT SETTLED? WINNER FOR A SECOND CHANCE? Have you gone through small claims, civil, or family court? Do you live in the greater Washington DC area? Whether your case is recent from the past, looking for real people who received judgment and are interested revisiting the argument- to either challenge who won, or defend your winning title! Financial stipend provided for approved participants, willing to share their story with America. MORE INFO, PLEASE EMAIL BEFORE MAY 18TH, 2026 WITH: Your name and contact information brief description Any relevant your case and judgement social media links'

Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję 2 aktorów do następujących ról:

1. Igor Flaszka (41) - lokalny lichwiarz, „uliczny oprych w drogim wdzianku”. Z jednej strony bardzo uprzejmy, kulturalny, dobrze ubrany (drogi garnitur, zegarek, zadbany wygląd), z drugiej czuć od niego uliczny cynizm i twardość. Typ, który świetnie gra wzorowego obywatela, ale pod powierzchnią jest bezwzględny i niebezpieczny.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

2. Marcin Pawlicki (39) – prywatny detektyw - inteligentny, schludny, ale trochę „po przejściach”, niezależny typ. Powinien mieć wiarygodny vibe prywatnego detektywa: laptop, telefon, auto, lekkie nerwy. 

Data: 07. i 08. maja

items.text:
WROCŁAW // TRUDNE SPRAWY
Dzień dobry, cześć!

Do serialu "Trudne Sprawy" poszukuję aktorów i aktorek do następujących ról:

❗UWAGA - proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane❗

🗓️ 12.05 (WTOREK) - 13.05 (ŚRODA) - 14.05 (CZWARTEK)

JULIA Niewiadomska (19 - 24 lata) – sprzedawczyni w księgarni, dorabia jako modelka.

Wygląd: Szczupła dziewczyna, z długimi blond rozpuszczonymi włosami. Ma regularne, atrakcyjne rysy twarzy. Zwykle nosi proste, codzienne ubrania: dżinsy, t-shirty, trampki.

Szczegóły: Córka bogatych rodziców. Oczytana, wykształcona. Miła, uśmiechnięta, z poczuciem własnej wartości. Zakochana w Marku (głównym bohaterze).

🗓️ 12.05 (WTOREK)

WŁADEK Frankowski (37 - 43 lata) – kucharz w pizzerii Marka.

Wygląd: Najlepiej rozmiar L, XL.

Szczegóły: Miły, pracowity.

🗓️ 13.05 (ŚRODA)

JACEK Radziewski (25 - 31 lat) – przyjaciel Marka.

Wygląd: Średniego wzrostu, najlepiej przy kości i z kręconymi włosami.

Szczegóły: Spokojny, rozsądny, ironiczny. Przyjaźni się z Markiem od dawna i dobrze go zna. Czasami naśmiewa się ze swojego przyjaciela.

❗PONIŻEJ TYLKO OSOBY Z WROCŁAWIA LUB NAJBLIŻSZEJ OKOLICY❗

🗓️ 12.05 (WTOREK)

MATKA Julii (42 - 48 lat) – zadbana kobieta z fryzurą od fryzjera.

🗓️ 12.05 (WTOREK)

SĄSIADKA Julii (45 - 55 lat) - bez znaków szczególnych.

🗓️ 13.05 (ŚRODA)

DZIEWCZYNA Marka (18 - 24 lata) – wyzywająca uroda (może być po zabiegach estetycznych, doczepy we włosach, wyrazisty styl itd.).

🗓️ 14.05 (CZWARTEK)

KAROL Lipowiecki (24 - 30 lat) – kolega Marka.

🗓️ 14.05 (CZWARTEK)

CHŁOPAK Laury (27 - 33 lata) – duży, napakowany.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia, a dla ról: JULIA, JACEK, WŁADEK zapewniamy nocleg.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule

"Trudne Sprawy, odc. 1354 + IMIĘ postaci"

wraz z AKTUALNYM zdjęciem oraz wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby)

WhatsApp'em numer:

+48 798 970 883

lub na maila:

lukasz.wrzeszczynski-siuda@polotmedia.pl

Nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne na Messengerze.

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach i przedziale wiekowym 😊

Czekam na zgłoszenia!

items.text:
Markus Burghardt spricht bei Christian Weiße in Teil 2 offen über Liebe, Leben, Lust und Geld. Du erfährst, wie Asien ihn geprägt hat, wie sein Coming-out verlief und warum er Freiheit heute kritischer sieht. 

In Teil 2 meiner Karrideo TV "Storie" aus der Reihe "Setgeflüster" führe ich Markus Burghardt deutlich tiefer in seine Biografie. Ausgehend von seiner sportlichen Ausstrahlung und seinem Lebensstil geht das Gespräch schnell in die Themen, die diesen Teil so besonders machen: Asien, Selbstfindung, Sexualität, Familie, Geld, Freiheit und Unternehmertum. 

Als Gastgeber halte ich das Gespräch bewusst offen, direkt und persönlich. Ich greife seine Antworten auf, bohre an den richtigen Stellen nach und führe Markus Burghardt von Wassersport, Reisen und Sri Lanka hin zu sehr intimen Stationen seines Lebenswegs. Dadurch entsteht kein oberflächlicher Talk, sondern ein ehrliches Studio-Gespräch mit Ecken, Geschichte und Haltung. 

Markus erzählt, wie früh ihn Asien geprägt hat, wie sein Weg als schwuler Mann begann, wie Familie zunächst mit Bruch reagierte und sich später vieles veränderte. Dazu kommen starke Passagen über Geld, Luxus, Unabhängigkeit, alte Freiräume, heutige Oberflächlichkeiten und seinen Blick auf Nachtleben, Apps und Begegnungen. 

Teil 2 funktioniert für sich allein, baut aber zugleich Spannung für Teil 3 auf. Dort geht es noch gezielter um das Unternehmertum von Markus Burghardt. Wenn Du Gespräche magst, die nicht geschniegelt, sondern echt sind, bist Du hier genau richtig. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, welcher Moment zwischen mir als Gastgeber und Markus Burghardt Dich in Teil 2 am stärksten gepackt hat. 

Welche Passage zeigt für Dich am stärksten, wie sehr Liebe, Freiheit und Selbstbild vom jeweiligen Zeitgeist geprägt werden? 

Abonnier Karrideo TV und aktiviere die Glocke, damit Du Teil 3 mit Markus Burghardt nicht verpasst. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, welche Frage von Christian Weiße in Teil 2 das Gespräch am stärksten geöffnet hat. 

Teile das Video mit Menschen, die ehrliche Studio-Gespräche mit Haltung und Biografie mögen. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse 

#MarkusBurghardt #ChristianWeiße #Setgefluester #KarrideoTV #LiebeLebenLustGeld

items.summary:
Markus Burghardt spricht bei Christian Weiße in Teil 2 offen über Liebe, Leben, Lust und Geld. Du erfährst, wie Asien ihn geprägt hat, wie sein Coming-out verlief und warum er Freiheit heute kritischer sieht. 

In Teil 2 meiner Karrideo TV "Storie" aus der Reihe "Setgeflüster" führe ich Markus Burghardt deutlich tiefer in seine Biografie. Ausgehend von seiner sportlichen Ausstrahlung und seinem Lebensstil geht das Gespräch schnell in die Themen, die diesen Teil so besonders machen: Asien, Selbstfindung, Sexualität, Familie, Geld, Freiheit und Unternehmertum. 

Als Gastgeber halte ich das Gespräch bewusst offen, direkt und persönlich. Ich greife seine Antworten auf, bohre an den richtigen Stellen nach und führe Markus Burghardt von Wassersport, Reisen und Sri Lanka hin zu sehr intimen Stationen seines Lebenswegs. Dadurch entsteht kein oberflächlicher Talk, sondern ein ehrliches Studio-Gespräch mit Ecken, Geschichte und Haltung. 

Markus erzählt, wie früh ihn Asien geprägt hat, wie sein Weg als schwuler Mann begann, wie Familie zunächst mit Bruch reagierte und sich später vieles veränderte. Dazu kommen starke Passagen über Geld, Luxus, Unabhängigkeit, alte Freiräume, heutige Oberflächlichkeiten und seinen Blick auf Nachtleben, Apps und Begegnungen. 

Teil 2 funktioniert für sich allein, baut aber zugleich Spannung für Teil 3 auf. Dort geht es noch gezielter um das Unternehmertum von Markus Burghardt. Wenn Du Gespräche magst, die nicht geschniegelt, sondern echt sind, bist Du hier genau richtig. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, welcher Moment zwischen mir als Gastgeber und Markus Burghardt Dich in Teil 2 am stärksten gepackt hat. 

Welche Passage zeigt für Dich am stärksten, wie sehr Liebe, Freiheit und Selbstbild vom jeweiligen Zeitgeist geprägt werden? 

Abonnier Karrideo TV und aktiviere die Glocke, damit Du Teil 3 mit Markus Burghardt nicht verpasst. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, welche Frage von Christian Weiße in Teil 2 das Gespräch am stärksten geöffnet hat. 

Teile das Video mit Menschen, die ehrliche Studio-Gespräche mit Haltung und Biografie mögen. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse 

#MarkusBurghardt #ChristianWeiße #Setgefluester #KarrideoTV #LiebeLebenLustGeld

sharedPost.text:
🎧 10.000 Downloads – ich bin überwältigt!
Was für ein Meilenstein! 🎉 Mein Podcast für Gesang & Stimme hat 10.000 Downloads erreicht – und das verdanke ich euch. Danke, danke, danke! 🙏
Im Podcast dreht sich alles rund ums Singen:
🎙️ Atmung & Stimmklang
🎵 Gesangstechnik für alle Level
🧠 Wissen aus der Stimmwissenschaft
🎤 Bühnenpräsenz & Ausdruck
✨ Impulse für deinen Übungsalltag
Egal ob du gerade erst anfängst oder schon lange singst – hier ist für jeden etwas dabei! Alle 2 Monate gibt es eine neue Folge mit frischer Inspiration. 🌟
Du findest den Podcast auf:
🟢 Spotify
🍎 Apple Podcasts
🎵 Deezer
📖 Audible
📺 RTL+
👉 Unter Linktree in der Bio oder direkt unter www.singasong-behappy.de/podcast-fur-gesang-und-stimme
Sing A Song – Be Happy! 🎶
Deine Bernadette 😊

Casting Call for a student short film that I am filming next week. Relevant information is included as attached. 

If you have any questions, or if you are interested, please email me at Osworld.media@gmail.com and provide a headshot and/or small showreel, and I shall provide a copy of the script and discuss futher with you.

I am looking for a male and female aged 30+ to play the roles of the mother and father of my protagonist. The parents are featured in two scenes in the film, totalling to approximately 3-4 minutes of sceen time.

Please respond as soon as you can if you are interested, as filming will take place on either Sunday 12th April or Monday 13th April, depending on what is most convenient

Many thanks

BOEING BOEING ACTOR CALL OUT!
Rowntree Players are delighted to announce that audition registration for Boeing Boeing is now open✈️

Don’t miss your chance to be part of this fast-paced, hilarious comedy — we’d love to see you there!

Register now and get ready for take-off… 👀✨

Click the link to read our audition pack and register - https://www.rowntreeplayers.co.uk/ 

🎭 Boeing Boeing

📅 23rd - 25th July 2026

📍 The Joseph Rowntree Theatre, York

Cleared for Takeoff: A High-Flying Farce!�This 1960s French farce adapted for the English-speaking stage features self-styled Parisian lothario Bernard, who has Italian, German and American fiancées, each a beautiful airline hostess with frequent “layovers.” He keeps “one up, one down, and one pending” – until unexpected schedule changes bring all three to Paris, and Bernard’s apartment, at the same time.

items.text:
Heya
Just wanted to introduce myself. I’m based between Brighton and London, and have had a strong passion for creation and expression.  I have a strong interest in projects that lean into more depth and emotion. 

I’m always happy and open to collaborate and get involved wherever I can, whether that’s on screen, or supporting the wider creative process. I appreciate being a part of projects that aim to create something a little different.

Looking forward to connecting with you all and seeing what’s we could work on!

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — OneTigris Brand Video Production**

We're shooting a 2-day commercial video campaign for **OneTigris** (onetigris.com), a leading tactical outdoor gear brand, and we're looking for talented on-camera performers in the **Los Angeles area**!

📅 **Shoot Days: May 2 & May 3** — you must be available for BOTH days to apply.

**🟠 ROLE 1 — MAIN TALENT (Male)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Primary on-camera presence across all brand videos
* Must be comfortable and confident on camera
* Capable of handling tactical/outdoor gear scenes
* Athletic, active look that fits an outdoor lifestyle brand
* Commercial or brand experience a plus

⏱ **May 2:** Full day (~10 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~6 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $300 per half-day**

**🟠 ROLE 2 — SUPPORTING TALENT (Female)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Background and supporting roles (gym, security, lifestyle scenes)
* Split-screen and contrast shots with main talent
* Hand model shots featuring gear and accessories
* Pickup and coverage footage
* Easygoing, versatile, collaborative on set

⏱ **May 2:** Partial day (~6–8 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~3–4 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

**🟠 Background Performers** 1–2 additional background performers may be needed. 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

⚠️ **Please only apply if you are available for BOTH May 2 and May 3.** We are unable to accommodate partial availability for these roles.

**📩 TO APPLY, email casting@rarefloweragency.com:** 

✔ Your name & contact info 

✔ 2–3 recent photos (including one full-body) 

✔ Brief bio or any on-camera/commercial experience 

✔ Confirmation that you're available May 2 & 3

sharedPost.text:
🚑 Profesjonalne wsparcie medyczne z ROB-Rescue! 🚒
W sytuacjach, gdzie liczy się każda sekunda i najwyższa precyzja, warto postawić na profesjonalistów. ROB-Rescue to zespół doświadczonych ratowników, dla których bezpieczeństwo i życie ludzkie są najwyższym priorytetem.

Sprawdź, w czym możemy Ci pomóc:
🚑 Transport Medyczny (Krajowy i Zagraniczny) – Bezpieczny i komfortowy przewóz pacjentów pod opieką wykwalifikowanego personelu. Działamy na terenie całej Polski oraz Europy!

🪖 Szkolenia z Pierwszej Pomocy + Medycyna Pola Walki – To nie są zwykłe kursy. Uczymy ratowania życia w warunkach ekstremalnych, łącząc klasyczną pierwszą pomoc z elementami ratownictwa pola walki (TCCC).

🛡️ Zabezpieczenie Medyczne Imprez – Gwarantujemy profesjonalną obstawę medyczną podczas eventów, koncertów i zawodów sportowych.

Dlaczego warto nam zaufać? Posiadamy nowoczesny sprzęt, bogate doświadczenie i podejście oparte na praktyce. Nie boimy się trudnych wyzwań – działamy tam, gdzie inni nie dają rady.

🤝 Rozpocznij współpracę z ROB-Rescue!
Potrzebujesz transportu medycznego dla bliskiej osoby? Chcesz przeszkolić swój zespół z procedur, które realnie ratują życie? A może organizujesz event?

📩 Napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej! 
📞 Zadzwoń i zapytaj o szczegóły:577911340

Bądź gotowy na wszystko. Wybierz profesjonalizm ROB-Rescue!

#ROBRescue #TransportMedyczny #MedycynaPolaWalki #TCCC #PierwszaPomoc #Ratownictwo #Bezpieczeństwo #ZabezpieczenieMedyczne

Dann melde dich einfach bei uns !

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

Mutige Darsteller/in in Düsseldorf und Umgebung gesucht 🎞🎥

Das wohl mutigste Kurzfilm Projekt steht uns bevor! 

Dazu werden noch Schauspieler und Komparsen gesucht! 🫵 (m/w/d)
Hast du Lust vor der Kamera zu stehen und kein Problem "Preußen" in die Welt zu rufen, dann bist du hier genau richtig!

🔲 Wann? Mai/Juni 2026
🔲 Wo? Raum Düsseldorf 
🔲 Gage? No Budget 

Die gemachten Aufnahmen dürfen für's persönliche Showreel frei genutzt werden. Für Verpflegung 🥘 ist gesorgt. Gage kann leider nicht gezahlt werden.

Ziel ist es einen modernen Kurzfilm in höchster Kinoqualität zu produzieren 💪

Bewerbung, bitte mit Infos (Alter, Schauspielerfahrung,...) und zwei Fotos als PN an mich!

Danke und viel Erfolg!
Aus Rheinprovinz

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL - TRAVEL AND FOOD PAID **

One Day Filming on August 1st - West Yorkshire 

**ROLES (Authentic Yorkshire Accents Required) **

** **

**Cory**

Early 20's, funny, kind, and a beloved friend. But tonight, Cory feels like he doesn't live up to any of those traits. Everyone around him is having a good time, but he's struggling to connect. Nature calls, and Cory's need to use the urinals is stalled by an unashamed, half drunk, local bar fly. 

**‘The Man’**

Only known as 'The Man', probably around 40 to 60 years of age, he's your local pub's number 1 fan. The regulars may describe him as larger than life, or crass and rude, depending on who you ask. The Man finds himself having casual urinal talk to a timid 20 year old just trying to get through the day. 

**Compensation **

Transport and food will be covered. This is a microbudget short film. 

Send your CV/showreel to:* analog.studios@outlook.com*
Subject line: *Urinal Casting*

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Urinal SIGUATIONAL SHORT FILM ABOUT THE FILM Cory, an anxious introvert is left alone in the toilets with a boozed-up bar fly. The only way out is to conquer his stage fright and use the urinal. The pressure is on. ROLES Lead: male, early 20's Support: male, 40's 40's-50's 50's Shoot date: Saturday Ist August'

CASTING CALL! 🏀 

Wings Theatre School is on the lookout for two musical theatre performers aged 11-18 to take on these iconic roles in our upcoming production of High School Musical Jr. at The Assembly Rooms, Tamworth this August!

We are on the look out for:

Troy Bolton – the charismatic basketball star with a passion for singing. Strong vocals, natural stage presence and dance technique.

Chad Danforth – Troy’s best friend and teammate. Energetic, comedic and the ability to sing 

⭐️ Performance Dates ⭐️
22nd August – 7pm
23rd August – 1pm

This is an exciting opportunity to be part of a Wings Theatre School production with a supportive and passionate team!

📧 If you’re interested to find out more, please message us directly, or email us at hello@belimitlesscic.co.uk

**Looking for a new type of Acting Class?**

Actors based in or near to Manchester, 

Actor and acting coach Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) is now running weekly acting classes in South Manchester. 

Andy’s classes are different from most! Firstly Andy has over 20 years experience in the industry working with some of the biggest Directors and Actors in the business!

Andy’s classes are proactive, on your feet lessons where **Doing** is the done thing! 

 

Andy is also a keen director and film maker bringing that skill set into the lessons means that each monthly block **You walk away with two showreel style quality scenes! **

All for the bargain price of just £85 for four classes! 

Email [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) to book!

items.text:
## 🎬 CASTING CALL: Political Campaign Commercial
**Filming Dates:** May 1st & May 2nd, 2026
**Location:** Los Angeles Area
**Rate:** $75 (Flat)
We are seeking **authentic, diverse, and grounded** individuals to appear in a series of 30-second campaign commercials. We want real people with "slight imperfections"—no "actor" looks or business suits required.
### **REMAINING ROLES NEEDED:**
 * **[PARENT]**: 30s, young blonde female. Role involves walking a child to school; must convey a natural sense of warmth.
 * **[SMALL BUSINESS OWNER]**: Any gender/ethnicity, ages 30–60. Role involves unlocking a shop and handling state paperwork.
 * **[TECH WORKER/ENGINEER]**: Any ethnicity, 20s–40s. Should look natural in a lab or data center environment. (Wardrobe: Skinny black shirt/casual tech attire).
 * **[ASIAN FAMILY]**: Multi-generational family (Parents/Children) for a dinner table scene.
 * **[TRUCK DRIVER & SPOUSE]**:
   * **Driver:** Black male, 30s–50s.
   * **Spouse:** Latina female, 30s–50s. Scene involves an early morning goodbye at home.
 * **[STUDENTS/LAB WORKERS]**: Ages 18–25. To appear in a high-tech/robotics classroom setting.
 * **[BACKGROUND EXTRAS]**: Diverse group of all ages to represent the community in various "safety" and "opportunity" scenes.
### **PRODUCTION DETAILS:**
 * **Vibe:** Cinematic and natural. We are looking for "real" moments, not staged performances.
 * **Wardrobe:** Normal, everyday clothing (no suits except for lead).
 * **Camera Style:** Slight handheld movement for a grounded, legit look.
**TO APPLY:**
Please send a clear photo and your availability for May 1–2 to [keeler@mcshanellc.com].
*Help us get California moving again!

topComments.text: I got ptsd trying to read this

sharedPost.text:
COMPLETE BEGINNER? 🤔 TRYING TO FIND YOUR DANCING FEET AGAIN? 

Finding the right dance class is a journey! Some classes are too frantic, some are too boring, many may leave you feeling exhausted and lost, rather than feeling challenged but satisfied. Some instructors are too "cringe" and hyper, while others are very disciplined or dry. 

If you’ve tried starting the journey to find YOUR perfect fit, good for you! 🙌 But if that first try wasn’t quite right, don’t let that stop you from trying again!!

Liverpool is blessed with a ton of fantastic dance instructors and classes. 🥰 But one approach/style doesn’t fit everybody. So if you still have that urge to dance, come and give my classes a try. Great introductory offers to make it easy for you and a lot to gain if it turns out to be your new future-fave! 😉

If you’d like to find out what the classes can do for you, drop me a message! 

Monday 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3, usually £6)

Thursday 7pm - 8pm (First session FREE!! Usually £6) - *Thursdays start back 14th May!! 

#dancemore #positivefeedback #FeelGoodFitness #liverpoollife #scousescene #trysomethingnew #halfprice #FreeClass #MoveMoreFeelBetter #mentalhealthmatters #mentalhealthawareness

SHOWS WANTED!
Do you have a script that encourages change? Do you have a story to tell that makes a difference? Then send it to us!

In August we are putting on Game Changers, an evening of theatre for change. 

If you have a story that discusses important issues, things that need to change or that has voices that need to be heard, please submit it to the link below by the 20th of May. All submissions will be replied to shortly after. 

Scripts must be no longer than 25 mins and have minimal tech/set. More info is provided at the link below. This is a profit share opportunity.

Submit here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdxoANsWmoGNrCAr-wn49E-7Io4_AQ4aFwilUKUWt5pNouKvw/viewform

Good luck!

sharedPost.text: Not gonna lie, I’m absolutely chuffed with this comment, especially in this day and age. It speaks volumes about the whole S.H.A.R.E team. Truly grateful to have worked with so many wonderful people on such an important film, and so glad it’s landing with so many. Hoping it continues to spark conversation and helps others through their own lived experiences. Keep the message alive and S.H.A.R.E. ☮️💛

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON, UNPAID)**

We’re casting for *“Jumpers for Goalposts,”* a coming-of-age short film at the London College of Communication.

**Logline:**
A London-set story exploring masculinity and body image within a local football team.

**SHOOT DATES:**
May 5th–12th (exact dates vary by role)

**LOCATION:** London (football ground + interior location)

ROLES:

**ROBBIE (Lead)**
Male, 17–23
A bench player struggling with body image and masculinity. Stocky build.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**CLIVE (Supporting)**
Male, 35–60
A local football coach. Informal, crass, blunt.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**MUM (Supporting)**
Female, 35–60
Robbie's mum. Caring and affectionate, close with Robbie.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**COLE (Supporting)**
Male, 17–23
The team’s best player. Confident, obnoxious, antagonistic toward Robbie.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**FOOTBALL PLAYERS (Extras)**
Male, 17–25
Background players on the team. No acting experience required.

TO APPLY:

Please send an email to jumpersforgoalpostsfilm@outlook.com with your name, headshot, CV, and any showreels if applicable.

items.text:
# Chasing Shadows - Pilot Episode
--

Seeking cast & crew for an online TV show adaptation of a novel, "Chasing Shadows," a crime/thriller/romance centred around Astrid Clarke, an English FBI agent, who is put on a case surrounding a gang who have the FBI chasing their tails. She is forced to choose where her loyalties lie when her brother is revealed to be in the gang, too.

---

UNPAID - Do not apply if you live outside of Cambridgeshire, as production can’t guarantee travel will be covered at this time. A fundraiser will be created, and travel reimbursements will be discussed among the producer/director, should the target be hit. Depending on how much the fundraiser raises, anything left will be discussed between the producer and director as to payment, dependent on role significance.

Once filming has finished, an IMDB page will be created, and everyone will receive a credit. Food will also be sorted on set, all vegetarian-friendly to avoid dietary issues (unless specifically requested)

---

Shoots in June or early July (to avoid the summer holidays in the UK) within the Cambridgeshire area. Exact locations and dates TBD.

---

This DOES NOT apply to crew. The process is this: Prescreen, Script exert, Chem test, offer. Usually, within a week of each stage. Any communication would take place via Zoom :-)

Please include your location (e.g., Ely/Cambridge/Peterborough) and your availability for June/July. Production estimates a maximum of one week to shoot. A schedule will be created shortly for definitive dates.

--

Full listing info (including character specifics) here: https://www.backstage.com/casting/chasing-shadows-pilot-episode-3151533/?role_id=5524378&role_id=5524373&role_id=5524369

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Bezdomny 1 (40–50) - zaniedbany wygląd, ubranie warstwowe, „uliczne”, bardziej wycofany, mniej rozmowny, reaguje głównie na zachowanie kolegi i policjantów.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

2. Menel 1 (40-50) - mocno zaniedbany, pijany/otumaniony, bardziej pasywny (półleży na ławce). 

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

3. Menel 2 (41) - również zaniedbany, ale bardziej agresywny, wybuchowy, widocznie pijany, atakuje Ratownika i Gośkę.

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję 2 aktorów do następujących ról:

1. Igor Flaszka (41) - lokalny lichwiarz, „uliczny oprych w drogim wdzianku”. Z jednej strony bardzo uprzejmy, kulturalny, dobrze ubrany (drogi garnitur, zegarek, zadbany wygląd), z drugiej czuć od niego uliczny cynizm i twardość. Typ, który świetnie gra wzorowego obywatela, ale pod powierzchnią jest bezwzględny i niebezpieczny.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

2. Marcin Pawlicki (39) – prywatny detektyw - inteligentny, schludny, ale trochę „po przejściach”, niezależny typ. Powinien mieć wiarygodny vibe prywatnego detektywa: laptop, telefon, auto, lekkie nerwy. 

Data: 07. i 08. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark; **Remith Ramesh**, India; **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey; **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey; **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia; **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, USA, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/

Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text: Now casting: If there's anyone in the greater DC area who has gone through civil, family, or small claims court, and is willing to revisit and share their case- we want to hear from you! If you're not in the DC area, please feel free to share with people there. We're casting until May 18th. Details in the flyer

Opskriften der reddede min morgen! Morgenmad på 5 minutter. De er så lækre! Mine børn elsker disse!

Ingredienser:

6 skiver brød
6 skiver ost
6 skiver bacon
4 æg
Salt efter smag
Sort peber efter smag
Frisk persille, hakket
Forårsløg, hakket ...

Jeg skal sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter.
Tak

items.text:
CASTING CALL/ "Million Dollar Personality Girl" Short
>>CASTING CALL <<

We are SEEKING an actor with phenomenal range for upcoming ARTISTIC, 1930s based short “MDPG” that is shooting this summer 🎥

AMAZING opportunity to depict the 1930s BLACK HOLLYWOOD LEGEND, in a way never seen before--

BILL “BOJANGLES” ROBINSON 

(40s - 60s, African American, Male)

Legendary tap dancer whose success can’t  protect him from the era’s prejudices.  

CONCEPT:

He has a brief yet insightful conversation discussing black artists navigating 1930s Hollywood, with Jeni Le Gon, the first African American woman to sign a long-term contract with a major studio. 

-------------------------------

--TWO DAY WEEKEND SHOOT, filming this summer, August 2026

--ONE Location

--$450 flat rate/ IMBD Credit/ Meal & Reel

*Bonus if Tap Dancer, very light moves/ routine, this role is more centered for an ACTOR. 

*UNIQUE opportunity to SHINE in this role and demonstrate your ability 

-Location: Los Angeles, CA

-Must be LA-based

-$450 flat rate/ IMBD Credit/ Meal & Reel

-GENRE: DRAMA

-Film dates : August 2026, TBD

.

.

.

Please let me know if you’re interested!🙏🏾✨

.
.

Send Headshot/Resume/Reel to email below, titled “BILL SUBMISSION” in the subject.
.

.

.

NatDorcia94@gmail.com

Any Suggestions/ Recommendations are always greatly appreciated 🎥✨

items.text:
URGENT CASTING: Talent with REAL golf skills for Major Retail Brand Spot
Shoot Date: 5/3–5/6 (TBD how many days based on role.)

Location: Los Angeles, CA

Rate: $500 x Day + $2,000 usage

Non-union

GOLFER (Male)

Ages (26-38)

Preferably Caucasian

Height: 5’10-6'2

Size: M/L

We’re specifically looking for talent with golf skills, as golf performance will be featured in the spot. The campaign will run across broadcast, streaming, social, and will also include a photography component.

If you’re interested send self tapes of your driving swing & a putt, any portfolio images you may have full body & headshots. As well your sizing (Shirt M/L, Waist/inseam, shoe size, height & weight.) Email: allison.trimbell.dcsg@gmail.com

items.text:
Cześć, szukam aktorów statystów do etiudy studenckiej. Poszukuję:
* business woman: kobiety, najlepiej 30-40 lat, która może przyjechać ubrana "biurowo" - biała koszula, eleganckie spodnie lub spódnica itp.
* dziewczyny 20-30 lat, która potrafiłaby zrobić się "na bóstwo", bo nie mamy żadnego budżetu na makeup i włosy
* starszego mężczyzny, ubiór najlepiej "dziadkowy"

Etiuda realizowana na zaliczenie w AMA film academy w Warszawie.  Role niewielkie, ale więcej niż stanie w tle. Termin zdjęć 10 maja. Miejsce: Podkowa Leśna pod Warszawa.  Non profit. Z góry dziękuję za pomoc!

🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny rozgrywanej w pubie.

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 5 i 6 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: okolice Puszczy Kampinoskiej  

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „5-6 maja”

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– miejsce zamieszkania  
– wiek  
– wzrost  
– rozmiar ubrania  
– 2 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

Doszukujemy jeszcze panów na plan filmu "Kosmonauta" na 30.04. Wiek od 18 lat w górę bez ograniczeń.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy 130 zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)**

** **

Charakteryzacja dzisiaj 27.04 i jutro 28.04. Na strzyżenie są zapraszane tylko wybrane osoby.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie) i sylwetki: TYLKO Z DNIA ZGŁOSZENIA + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

@wszyscy

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy 130 zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)**

Charakteryzacja dzisiaj 27.04 i jutro 28.04. Na strzyżenie są zapraszane tylko wybrane osoby.

The cards have spoken - Nocturne is expanding…🌙✨

We are Nocturne, a theatrical progressive metal band conjured in Liverpool, UK, drawing from Tool, Ghost, Dream Theater, Genesis and Rush.

We are seeking a drummer to help expand our sound.

You should be:

• Experienced in live performance
• Able to commit to weekly rehearsals in Liverpool and/or Salford
• Comfortable in theatrical performance, costume, character, stage presence

If this feels like you, send us a DM or email nocturnebanduk@gmail.com with a video of you playing (10 extra points if it’s dance of eternity) 

Band age (20-30), regular gigs - headline coming up in June.

sharedPost.text:
SCHOS – My little Lake

Ein kleiner See, viel Licht, stille Wege am Ufer: My little Lake ist unser neuer Song mit englischen Lyrics – über einen Ort, an dem Fantasie und Himmel im Wasser spiegeln und der Kopf endlich ruhig wird.

Die Musik kommt aus Simbach am Inn, die Band aus mehreren Ländern – Rock mit klaren Melodien, englischem Text und viel Raum zum Eintauchen.

🎧 My little Lake ist bei allen gut sortierten Anbietern als Download und Stream verfügbar – z.B. Apple Music, Amazon Music und vielen weiteren Stores.

Musiker (Auszug)
Schos Riedl – keys, songwriting, production (Simbach am Inn, Bayern)
Racquel Roberts, voc (USA)
Mark Corradetti – bass (USA)
Paul Simmons – drums (USA)
Clint Wells – guitars (USA)

Mehr über SCHOS & alle Musiker:
🌐 Band: https://bandschos.com
🎼 Musiker & Credits: https://bandschos.com/musiker

© SCHOS – Schos Riedl. All rights reserved.

Hashtags (unter den Post setzen):

#SCHOS #MylittleLake #Rockmusic #EnglishLyrics #IndieRock #Simbach #AppleMusic #AmazonMusic #TimelessMusic

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 18/2026

DIE INTRIGANTE GLAMOURWELT DER MODE, AUTORIN ENID BLYTON WIEDER IM KINO UND 2 INTERESSANTE INTERVIEWS 

Vor genau 20 Jahren setzten Meryl Streep und Anne Hathaway neue Masstäbe in Sachen Glanz, Luxus aber auch Machtkämpfe. Nun kehren die beiden inkl neuer Charaktere zurück in DER TEUFEL TRÄGT PRADA 2.

Die Bücher der britischen Kinderbuchautorin wurden schon mehrmals verfilmt, nun erlebt ein weiterer Roman von ihr seine Kinopremiere, DER WUNDERWELTENBAUM.

Seit Jahren ist er einer der bekanntesten Dok Filmer des Landes, Georg Riha. Nun startet sein neuestes Werk in den Kinos. Sie lebt im schönen Weinviertel und hat u.a. schon mehrere Videos für die Feuerwehr gemacht,  Sonja Balazs. Mit beiden konnte Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs ein Gespräch führen. 

Musikalisch gibts diesmal ein best of der bekanntesten Filmsongs der letzten 80 Jahre. 

Mittwoch 29.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL

Purple Dreams Productions are casting the lead character in our upcoming play.

‘MURDER AT…’
There’s a killer in the cast! Comedy turns to tragedy as a murderer reveals themselves… but who will be their first victim?

This play is a psychological drama, based around a cast of actors as they put on a series of plays at their local theatre. 

We have 2 booked dates locked in at different venues, with the potential for more as new bookings come in.

29th May - Murder at the Quay Theatre
13th June - Murder at Cheltenham Playhouse

We’ve previously toured this play in Brentwood, Faversham, Lowestoft, Sittingbourne, Wickenby, Thame and Sleaford to great responses, and are looking forward to taking it to new audiences. 

Rehearsals will take place in Hunstanton (PE36) and will be as flexible as possible to work around previous commitments.

If you’re interested in joining our warm and friendly group, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact me via a DM on here, or at purple-dreams@hotmail.co.uk 

Many thanks 
Tobias Nicholls 
Creative Director 
Purple Dreams Productions

URGENT CASTING CALL

Purple Dreams Productions are casting the lead character in our upcoming play.

‘MURDER AT…’
There’s a killer in the cast! Comedy turns to tragedy as a murderer reveals themselves… but who will be their first victim?

This play is a psychological drama, based around a cast of actors as they put on a series of plays at their local theatre. 

We have 2 booked dates locked in at different venues, with the potential for more as new bookings come in.

29th May - Murder at the Quay Theatre
13th June - Murder at Cheltenham Playhouse

We’ve previously toured this play in Brentwood, Faversham, Lowestoft, Sittingbourne, Wickenby, Thame and Sleaford to great responses, and are looking forward to taking it to new audiences. 

Rehearsals will take place in Hunstanton (PE36) and will be as flexible as possible to work around previous commitments.

If you’re interested in joining our warm and friendly group, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact me via a DM on here, or at purple-dreams@hotmail.co.uk 

Many thanks 
Tobias Nicholls

Purple Dreams Productions

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SPANISH ACTRESSES
Hi, I’m Lucia, a Spanish film student in Berlin, planning my upcoming bachelor project, and I’m looking for a two Spanish actresses to collaborate with.

ABOUT THE FILM:

‘Las cosas se mueven en mi casa’ (‘Things are moving in my house’) is a B.A. graduation short film directed by Lucía Gil (www.luciagildp.com). It stems from the feeling of ‘in-betweenness’ that a young Spanish woman feels in Berlin - not fully feeling at home in Germany, but losing the anchor to her Spanish family, as she spends more time apart from them.

ABOUT THE ROLES:

- Abril (main role): 20-28 y/o

- Pilar (Abril’s mother): 50-70 y/o

NATIVE SPANISH IS REQUIRED.

PROJECT INFOS:

Shooting dates: 2-3 days between 1st-11th June

This is a no-budget student film, unpaid. 

Food and drinks will be provided on set, as well as good vibes 🙂

The film will be submitted to festivals.

If you are interested in one of the roles, please text me ! luciagilsuarez@gmail.com or @filmbylusi (ig).🫶🏼

items.text:
CASTING CALL (Seattle, WA)

Dates: May 9 and 10 (Seattle, WA)

Character Details:

ADAM (13-18) - Adam puts all his trust into his sister, but when asked to lie, his morals cause him to question her.

Film Synopsis:

"Falling Out" - Two siblings get into a fight caused by a cramped fallout bunker, lack of food, and a mysterious voice on a radio.

To Apply: 

Please send your headshot, name/age, and short video of you acting (monologue or reel) to Jmajosephson@gmail.com

Filming will take place in South Seattle on May 9 and 10 (all transportation costs will be reimbursed).  Please Note: This is a non-union student film.

Please let me know any questions or if you're interested!

Contact: Jmajosephson@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VIDEO / FASHION COLLABORATION – BERLIN
Hi! My name is Hanna and I’m a producer based in Berlin, currently working on a fashion video editorial in collaboration with Naomi Tarazi. 

We are shooting with a professional production team in a Berlin hotel location.

Looking for:
– Female model
– East / Southeast Asian appearance
– Slim build, strong natural presence
– Comfortable in front of camera (video & stills)

Concept:
A clean, intimate hotel setting with a slightly awkward, off-balance mood. Focus on body lines, movement, and subtle, unconventional posing.

Mood:
– minimal
– quiet
– slightly strange / cinematic
– feminine but not overly polished

Styling:
Naomi Tarazi garments (sculptural silhouettes, tights, textures) + mix of minimalistic clothes and designer pieces 

HMU:
Natural skin, simple hair (straight / tied)

Shooting:
– within the next month
– Berlin (hotel location)
– professional crew on set (production studio)

You will receive:
THIS IS AN UNPAID POSITION
– professional video material + edited images for your portfolio

Moodboard attached

If you feel aligned with this aesthetic, please DM me or comment with your portfolio / Instagram and I’ll end you more details✨

Or reach me by this Email Address: hanna@nusual.studio
Selected models may be considered for future collaborations

** Limited Actor + Model Headshot Sessions (Downtown LA – First Come First Serve)**

We’re opening up a very limited set of professional headshot sessions designed specifically for actors, models, and creatives looking to update their portfolio, casting profiles, and branding images.

This is part of our community's mission to **make professional creative resources more accessible to underserved and emerging talent**, while still maintaining industry-level quality.

First come, first serve — we will reach out directly to confirmed applicants
Date: Tentatively Friday (final confirmation pending)

** SESSION OPTIONS**

** $50 — Quick Refresh**
• 15 minutes
• 1 look
• 1–2 edited images
•* 2 slots available *

**$100 — Standard Headshot (Most Recommended)**
• 30 minutes
• 1 look
• 2–4 edited images

*4 slots available *

 **$200 — Professional Session**
• 60 minutes
• 1 look
• 5–7 edited images

*3 slots available *

 **$300 — Premium Session**
• 60 minutes
• 2 looks
• Full guided shoot experience
• 6–10 edited images

*1 slots available *

**Only 10 slots available this round!**

**HOW TO BOOK**

**Comment below with:**
1. **Your name**
2. **The tier you’re interested in ($50 / $100 / $200 / $300)**
3. **Your availability for Friday**

**We will review responses and reach out directly to confirm time slots.**

URGENT CASTING CALL

Purple Dreams Productions are casting the lead character in our upcoming play.

‘MURDER AT…’
There’s a killer in the cast! Comedy turns to tragedy as a murderer reveals themselves… but who will be their first victim?

This play is a psychological drama, based around a cast of actors as they put on a series of plays at their local theatre. 

We have 2 booked dates locked in at different venues, with the potential for more as new bookings come in.

29th May - Murder at the Quay Theatre
13th June - Murder at Cheltenham Playhouse

We’ve previously toured this play in Brentwood, Faversham, Lowestoft, Sittingbourne, Wickenby, Thame and Sleaford to great responses, and are looking forward to taking it to new audiences. 

Rehearsals will take place in Hunstanton (PE36) and will be as flexible as possible to work around previous commitments.

If you’re interested in joining our warm and friendly group, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact me via a DM on here, or at purple-dreams@hotmail.co.uk 

Many thanks 
Tobias Nicholls 
Creative Director 
Purple Dreams Productions

items.text:
Hey everyone!
My name is Sophie and I’m casting for an upcoming indie horror film and looking for two female main characters! 

I am looking for: 

Diane 

- 19-25 age range 

- Ambitious carer character 

- Any appearance welcomed 

- Happy for SFX makeup to be applied 🙂 

Franny

- 19-25 age range 

- Agoraphobic young adult character 

- Any appearance welcomed 

- Happy for SFX makeup to be applied 🙂 

Looking for actresses who would be available within the next few weeks to shoot! On some evenings and in the days! 

I’m looking for people around Colchester/Essex/Elmstead Market! 

Unfortunately, this project has no budget and is a indie collaboration project, therefore only suits actresses who are looking for showreel footage/experience, sorry 😞

It’ll be a really fun horror project, with a hope to submit to festivals! 

Please email sophiebrock3@hotmail.com for more info about the project and with a headshot of yours! 

Thanks again guys!! :)

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been so grateful for the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, actionable plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

sharedPost.text:
📢 THE REVOLUTION HAS A NAME: SODIES KASI TV! 🎬🔥
Meadowlands, the wait is over. We aren't just a channel; we are the heartbeat of the 10 Zones. We are the lens of the youth, the voice of the hustle, and the home of the untold story.

⚠️ THE REALITY CHECK (Building from Zero)
We want to be 100% transparent with our community. We are a Grassroots Startup proving that you don't need a million-rand budget to have a billion-rand vision.

NO Professional Tools: We use our smartphones and our brains. 📱🧠

NO Big Budget: We are fueled by pure passion and Kasi discipline. 💸❌

NO Physical Building: The streets of Ndofaya are our studio. 🏘️🛣️
If we can start with nothing, you have no excuse to stay still!

📺 OUR PRODUCTION LINEUP (The Sodies Slate)
We are currently filming and scouting for the following shows:

MEADOWLANDS HEART & THE BLOOD COIN: Our flagship dramas. Raw, high-tension storytelling.

KASI SOUL SESSION: A safe space to vent, confess, or share your "Glow-Up" story. (Anonymity respected).

THE HUSTLE PROFILE: Highlighting the entrepreneurs of the 10 Zones.

JUNIOR QUIZ REVOLUTION: 15 Learners competing for the title of the smartest in the Kasi. 🧠🏆

KASI NEWS & YOUTH VOICE: The headlines that matter to us, by us.

THE STAGE: Showcasing DJs, Producers, Poets, and Dancers. 🎧✍️

🚀 HOW TO JOIN THE MOVEMENT
1. FOR ACTORS & CREW (The Founding 40):

CASTING CALL!

Hello currently casting for a SAG-AFTRA short film “Let Him Play”

In need of the following roles:

Ryan (18)

Neurodivergent, sensitive, observant, and full

of unexpected wonder. His quirks include

tapping, wiping his nose, headphones on, masking

an extraordinary ear for music that no one has ever nurtured.

Julie (50)

A loving mother suffocated by a

failing marriage. She believes in her

boys but is trapped in survival mode.

Please send headshots and info to [lethimplayinfo@gmail.com](mailto:lethimplayinfo@gmail.com)

And we will send you instructions for self tape!

Shooting near LA in Lancaster June 27th and 28th!

items.text:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, writer, or just looking to connect with creative, like-minded people—this is your night.

Let’s build, collaborate, and create magic together 💫

CASTING CALL | RUNNERS | S27

We’re casting runners for a photo + video shoot for a major running brand. We need intermediate, advanced, and elite runners age 18+ across all identities. Experience with road running and good running form required. 

Pay is $2,000 for 1 day of work in New York, NY between Thu 5/28 - Wed 6/3 (1 day, TBD) with a fitting on Wed 5/27 or Tue 6/2. Must be 18+ and live in NY. Must disclose your talent agency if applicable. The advertiser’s name will be disclosed prior to booking if you are offered a role. 

We are also casting extras for this project! We need people ages 18-70 across all identities, pay is $500/day. See link for more info! 

TO APPLY:  https://www.weeblemountain.com/opencastingcalls/s27-runners

DON’T FIT THIS ROLE? Sign up for general consideration at https://weeblemountain.com/signup | We specialize in real people casting.

ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴛᴇᴅ ʟᴏᴏᴋʙᴏᴏᴋ — ᴀ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ-ꜱᴄᴇɴᴇ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀɪɴɢ 40+ ɪɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟꜱ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴠᴀʀɪᴏᴜꜱ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴇᴋɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴅɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴇꜱ, ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇxɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅꜱ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴇᴍᴘʜᴀꜱɪꜱ ᴏɴ ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴀᴜᴛʜᴇɴᴛɪᴄɪᴛʏ, ᴘʀᴇꜱᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴏɴ-ꜱᴇᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴍᴀɴᴄᴇ.

ᴀᴛᴛᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴏꜰ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴅ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ʙʀᴇᴀᴋᴅᴏᴡɴꜱ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ɪɴᴛᴏ 5 ꜱᴇᴘᴀʀᴀᴛᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰꜱ, ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ. ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ.

ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ, ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ:
• ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ  
• ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴇʟᴇᴠᴀɴᴛ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ  
• ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ ᴏɴʟʏ ꜰᴏʀ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴇʟʏ ꜰɪᴛ  

📲 ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟꜱ:  
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

📩 ꜰᴏʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴀᴅᴀ ᴏɴ:  +27 76 180 2729  

⚠️ ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴀᴠᴏɪᴅ ꜱᴇɴᴅɪɴɢ “ʜɪ/ʜᴇʏ” ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇꜱ — ᴏɴʟʏ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴏʀ ᴄʟᴇᴀʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ʀᴇꜱᴘᴏɴᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ.

ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴅᴏ ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ɴᴏᴛ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ.

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been amazed and grateful by the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, personalised plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

More info and application form at [www.avalontvcasting.com](http://www.avalontvcasting.com/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBEwYnVsa0h2dmwyeDRjMEZSVnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6mIV8dkLQk7oZbMKpSL9M-mogpIG6E6XPEo7JCQ1VnMiWvCX7NzJRDdh002w_aem_oSIn44xUl8OBDdai-OpoyA)
